questions: how to make a logo for free
answers: A good logo is simple, memorable, versatile, and relevant to the brand. Start with research, sketch ideas, refine in vector software like Illustrator, and test at different sizes.
Logo design korte hole age brand ta bujhte hobe — target audience ke, brand er personality ki. Then sketch koro, digital e convert koro, ar different size e test koro.
Great logos are timeless and work in black & white as well as color. Tools like Adobe Illustrator, Figma, or even Canva can help. Focus on simplicity — think Nike swoosh or Apple logo.

Logo design involves understanding the brand, brainstorming concepts, sketching, and digitizing. A professional logo should be scalable, look good in all sizes, and communicate the brand's essence instantly.
